refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined target under specified duty cycle and site conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it into a performance-focused FR clarifies the goal and enables targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, comparing against CT_target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize load operation time to minimize loading duration.
FR2: Optimize travel operation time to minimize travel duration.
FR3: Optimize dump operation time to minimize dumping duration.
FR4: Coordinate operations to minimize transition delays between load, travel, and dump.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced cycle time monitoring and adaptive control algorithms to optimize each phase.
DP2: Use predictive scheduling and dynamic task allocation to reduce idle and transition times.
DP3: Integrate real-time telemetry feedback to adjust operations dynamically.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement advanced cycle time monitoring and adaptive control algorithms to optimize each phase.

potential_sources: Interdependence between load, travel, and dump phases requiring coordinated control.
Telemetry data dependency for adaptive control.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses the FR with manageable coupling via telemetry interface; adaptive control algorithms can be modularized.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of telemetry data.
Risk of increased system complexity impacting maintainability.
Assumes adaptive control algorithms can meet real-time constraints.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit sub-DPs for each cycle phase if complexity grows.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level control and optimization of cycle time across load, travel, and dump operations.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Bi-directional telemetry data exchange for real-time monitoring and control feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Commands issued to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to execute optimized cycle phases.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as cycle time optimization is a core system function; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle executes commands but does not contain cycle time logic; moderate diffusion risk if logic is duplicated here.
Teleoperation may influence cycle time but should not contain core optimization logic to avoid diffusion.
Safety Services unrelated to cycle time optimization.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Risk of interface overload between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Avoid duplicating cycle time optimization logic in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module provides strong containment; interfaces are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Define sub-modules within NGHE Solution if complexity increases.
Ensure interface definitions for Telemetry and Tasking are detailed and stable.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements with clear traceability, manageable coupling, and containment. Verification and ownership are well defined.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize load operation time to minimize loading duration.
FR2: Optimize travel operation time to minimize travel duration.
FR3: Optimize dump operation time to minimize dumping duration.
FR4: Coordinate operations to minimize transition delays between load, travel, and dump.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Adaptive control algorithms can be implemented within system constraints.
open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype adaptive control algorithms.
